notes: Multiple US brands already sell 80% concentrated vinegar: Calyptus, SimpleNature, Joly's, Simply Vinegar at similar price points on Amazon and Home Depot. Market is crowded.
Fragmented but existing market: The Unscented Co., Eco-Me, Meliora, Natural Flower Power all sell fragrance-free all-purpose cleaners. No dominant player but category exists.
Same as Klok - multiple small brands serve the fragrance-free/sensitive skin niche. Would need significant brand differentiation to compete.
Nellie's dominates the bulk dishwasher powder/value segment in US. Also sold by refill shops and eco-brands. Hard to differentiate on value alone.
Nellie's sells 1,100-load bulk buckets of dishwasher powder. Exactly the Dutch concept already in US market.

product_name: WC Eend Action Gel Lavender Fresh
notes: Toilet Duck (WC Eend) is already sold in North America including Home Depot Canada with the signature duck-neck bottle. Brand exists in market.
Same as above - Toilet Duck brand exists in North America.
Toilet Duck brand products already available. Additionally, Clorox ToiletWand and similar disc/pod systems exist in US.
